_publications._publicationTitle: Inhibition of focal adhesion kinase impairs tumor formation and preserves hearing in a murine model of NF2-related schwannomatosis.

_contextSnippet: immunohistochemical analysis revealed a significant decrease of IL-6 in DKO DRG, suggesting that Fak inhibition suppresses inflammatory signaling
details: Immunohistochemical analysis revealed significant decrease of IL-6 in DKO DRG, suggesting Fak inhibition suppresses inflammatory signaling
